file_name: Magenta Therapeutics, Inc. - Master Development and Manufacturing Agreement.txt

perturbation.original_text: 1.18 "Specifications" means the requirements of all Applicable Laws, the master batch record, current standard operating procedures and the procedures, process parameters, analytical tests and other attributes and written specifications for the Product attached hereto as part of a Project Plan, which the Parties agree are necessary for the manufacture and release of the Product for use in clinical trials. The Parties recognize that specifications for Product for a specific Project Plan are likely to change during the term of this Agreement, and the Parties agree to act in good faith and reasonably to effect such changes as may be required. Copies of such Specifications, as amended, shall be maintained by both Parties, and shall be incorporated into this Agreement and the Quality Agreement (as defined below).
perturbation.changed_text: 1.18 "Specifications" means the attributes and written specifications for the Product attached hereto as part of a Project Plan. The Parties recognize that specifications for Product for a specific Project Plan are likely to change during the term of this Agreement. Copies of such Specifications, as amended, shall be maintained by both Parties, and shall be incorporated into this Agreement and the Quality Agreement (as defined below).
perturbation.explanation: By removing "the requirements of all Applicable Laws, the master batch record, current standard operating procedures and the procedures, process parameters, analytical tests and other" from the definition of 'Specifications,' the definition becomes vague. While it is intended to mean something specific as mentioned in Section 5.4 'Each deliverable (including Product) developed or produced in connection with a Project Plan and this Agreement shall conform to the Specifications', it now lacks the details necessary for concrete enforcement. The term 'conform to the Specifications' becomes ambiguous without a precise definition of Specifications.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5.4 Deliverables. Each deliverable (including Product) developed or produced in connection with a Project Plan and this Agreement shall conform to the Specifications. The Development Work, as described in the Project Plan, shall conform to the Development Specifications. Bachem shall warrant compliance with the agreed acceptance criteria together with the results as reported on the Certificate of Analysis in conjunction with the analytical methods at the time of the release of Product. In no event shall Bachem be liable for any defects that could not have been detected by Bachem with the analytical test methods in operation at the date of product release. For reasons of clarity, the Parties acknowledge and agree that it shall remain solely the responsibility and liability of Magenta to determine the suitability of the Product for any intended or specific use of the Product. Bachem makes no expressed or implied guarantees, warranties or undertakings as to the use of the Product for an intended or specific purpose or use.
perturbation.justification: The modified text removes specific requirements from the definition of 'Specifications', making it vague. This directly contradicts Section 5.4, which states that deliverables 'shall conform to the Specifications.' Without the detailed requirements previously included in the definition, it's unclear what 'conform to the Specifications' actually means, rendering the obligation in Section 5.4 ambiguous and potentially unenforceable. The change creates a direct conflict and inconsistency that would cause confusion and potential legal issues within the document.

perturbation.original_text: 5.2 Services. Bachem shall provide the Services in accordance with each Project Plan. Bachem will perform all Services in accordance with this Agreement and the agreed upon Specifications. All Products shall be packaged, labeled and shipped in accordance with this Agreement, the applicable Project Plan and all Applicable Laws. Bachem and its employees and agents have, and will continue to have, the knowledge, experience, facilities, equipment and skill to provide, and will provide, the Services in a professional and timely manner. Services will conform to consistently high standards of workmanship and the specifications applicable to each Project Plan.
perturbation.changed_text: 5.2 Services. Bachem shall provide the Services in accordance with each Project Plan. Bachem will perform all Services in accordance with this Agreement and the agreed upon Specifications. All Products shall be packaged, labeled and shipped in accordance with this Agreement and the applicable Project Plan. Bachem and its employees and agents have, and will continue to have, the knowledge, experience, facilities, equipment and skill to provide the Services in a professional and timely manner. Services will conform to consistently high standards of workmanship and the specifications applicable to each Project Plan.
perturbation.explanation: The removal of "All Applicable Laws" in this section creates an in-text contradiction, because it is expected that a legal manufacturing agreement will follow all laws, rules and regulations. However, if it's removed from here, the legal standing of the contract becomes questionable, which is also tied to compliance and quality assurance in Section 5.10.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5.10 Report of Noncompliance. In the event that an employee or agent of Bachem who is working on a Project Plan fails to comply with Applicable Laws, this Agreement or any applicable agreement as the same relates to the Services, and such failure is discovered by or comes to the attention of Bachem's COO or a supervisor of Bachem with respect to the applicable Project Plan, Bachem will immediately notify Magenta in writing. Appropriate action will be taken by Bachem at the direction of Magenta, after Bachem consults in good faith with Magenta, as to what actions might be undertaken by Bachem in view of the particular facts surrounding such noncompliance.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies that all products shall be packaged, labeled, and shipped in accordance with the agreement, the applicable project plan, and 'all applicable laws.' The changed text removes 'all applicable laws.' Section 5.10, the contradicted text, discusses the report of noncompliance with 'applicable laws.' By removing the explicit requirement to follow all applicable laws in the changed text of Section 5.2, a contradiction is created with Section 5.10, as it is no longer explicitly stated that the services must adhere to applicable laws, even though noncompliance is still considered a reportable event.

perturbation.original_text: 15.12 Dispute Resolution. The parties shall attempt in good faith to resolve any dispute arising out of or relating to this Agreement promptly by negotiations between executives who have authority to settle the controversy. Any party may give the other party written notice of any dispute not resolved in the normal course of business. Within [***] after delivery of said notice, executives of both parties shall meet at a mutually acceptable time and place in the State of New York or as otherwise agreed and thereafter as often as they reasonably deem necessary to exchange relevant information and to resolve the dispute. Once the executive of either party determines that additional meetings are not likely to resolve the dispute, each of the parties shall be entitled to terminate such meetings and the dispute shall be submitted to binding arbitration. The binding arbitration shall be in accordance with the rules and procedures for commercial arbitration of the American Arbitration Association. Unless the parties to such dispute agree otherwise in writing, any such arbitration shall be conducted in New York pursuant to New York law, without any consideration of conflict of law issues, and the results of such arbitration shall be final and binding on the parties and enforceable in any court of competent jurisdiction. Notwithstanding the foregoing, the parties acknowledge and agree that each of them shall have the right to seek immediate injunctive and other equitable relief through the courts in the event of any material breach by the other party of any provision of this Agreement that would cause the non-breaching party irreparable injury for which there would be no adequate remedy at law. Any such legal proceeding will be brought in the applicable state or federal court of the State of New York, and the parties hereby consent to this exclusive jurisdiction for this purpose.
perturbation.changed_text: 15.12 Dispute Resolution. The parties shall attempt in good faith to resolve any dispute arising out of or relating to this Agreement promptly by negotiations between executives who have authority to settle the controversy. Any party may give the other party written notice of any dispute not resolved in the normal course of business. Within [***] after delivery of said notice, executives of both parties shall meet at a mutually acceptable time and place or as otherwise agreed and thereafter as often as they reasonably deem necessary to exchange relevant information and to resolve the dispute. Once the executive of either party determines that additional meetings are not likely to resolve the dispute, each of the parties shall be entitled to terminate such meetings and the dispute shall be submitted to binding arbitration. The binding arbitration shall be in accordance with the rules and procedures for commercial arbitration of the American Arbitration Association. Unless the parties to such dispute agree otherwise in writing, any such arbitration shall be conducted in pursuant to law, without any consideration of conflict of law issues, and the results of such arbitration shall be final and binding on the parties and enforceable in any court of competent jurisdiction. Notwithstanding the foregoing, the parties acknowledge and agree that each of them shall have the right to seek immediate injunctive and other equitable relief through the courts in the event of any material breach by the other party of any provision of this Agreement that would cause the non-breaching party irreparable injury for which there would be no adequate remedy at law. Any such legal proceeding will be brought in the applicable state or federal court of the State of New York, and the parties hereby consent to this exclusive jurisdiction for this purpose.
perturbation.explanation: By removing "in the State of New York" in the first paragraph and removing "New York" in the second paragraph, the dispute resolution process now has conflicting information on where the location is and which state law to use, to govern the agreement. This undermines the predictability and enforceability of the dispute resolution clause, creating uncertainty for both parties involved in the contract. If section 15.11 governing law is mentioned to New York law, it can also create a contradiction in which laws must be follow in case of disputes.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 15.11 Governing Law. This Agreement will be construed and interpreted and its performance governed by the laws of the State of New York, without giving effect to its conflict of laws principles. The parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the state and federal courts in New York for any suit, action or proceeding relating to this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the specification of 'in the State of New York' for the meeting location of executives and removes 'New York' specifying where arbitration should be conducted. This directly contradicts section 15.11, which explicitly states that the agreement is governed by the laws of the State of New York and that the parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the state and federal courts in New York. The modified text creates ambiguity about which state's laws govern the dispute resolution process and where arbitration will occur, directly conflicting with the clear and exclusive jurisdiction established in section 15.11.
